name: !stop
description: Force stop all actions and commands that are currently executing.

name: !goToCoordinates
description: Go to the given x, y, z location.

name: !search
description: Search for the nearest block or entity of a given type by sweeping radii 32, 64, 128, 256, 511 from the bot's current position. Equivalent to running a maximum-radius search; there is no broader scan available.

constraints.target_must_be_concrete: Pass concrete block or entity names (e.g. "chicken", "diamond_ore"). Abstract category names (e.g. "any_log") are not supported and will fail.
constraints.exhaustion_is_terminal: If a previous !search for the same target returned 'search_exhausted', re-issuing !search from the same position will fail identically. Relocate first (e.g. !goToCoordinates, !moveAway) before searching again.
constraints.no_repeat_in_sequence: A second !search for the same target inside one recovery action sequence will short-circuit to 'search_already_attempted'.

name: !moveAway
description: Move a short distance away for unsticking or repositioning only. Direction is unpredictable — the bot goes wherever terrain is easiest and cannot be steered. Never use for: going up/down (use !goToSurface or !goToCoordinates), reaching a specific place (use !goToCoordinates), finding blocks/entities (use !searchForBlock or !searchForEntity).

distance.note: Large distances can send the bot toward unintended low-cost locations such as bedrock. Prefer 8-16 for unsticking; use 32 only for escaping a local obstruction.

name: !collectBlocks
description: Collect the nearest blocks of a given type.

name: !craftRecipe
description: Craft the given recipe a given number of times.

name: !smeltItem
description: Smelt the given item the given number of times.

name: !clearFurnace
description: Take all items out of the nearest furnace.

name: !placeHere
description: Place a given block in the current location. Do NOT use to build structures, only use for single blocks/torches.

name: !attack
description: Attack and kill the nearest entity of a given type.

name: !goToBed
description: Go to the nearest bed and sleep.

name: !stay
description: Stay in the current location no matter what. Pauses all modes.

name: !setMode
description: Set a mode to on or off. A mode is an automatic behavior that constantly checks and responds to the environment.

name: !digDown
description: Digs down a specified distance. Stops if it reaches lava, water, or a fall >=4 blocks below the bot.

name: !goToSurface
description: Moves the bot to the highest block above it (usually the surface).

name: !useOn
description: Use (right click) the given tool on the nearest target of the given type.
